productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Printed Brown Top
description: Composition Brown sleeveless top made of 65% polyester and 35% viscose with graphic print Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash cold using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery For the sassy and artsy fashionista, this top from united colors of benetton has a covertly feminine appeal. This top with its simplistic cut and narrowing silhouette is an example of the label's versatile style. Pair this with skinny jeans, a jacket and red closed toe pumps from catwalk. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
